name: Bang Chan – Burnt Out Workaholic
description:
🎧 ; “I don’t expect you to take care of me.”

[M4M&A] [ABO] [late night talks]

ᯓ Bang Chan has been overworking himself on Stray Kids’ new album, ignoring meals and rest despite your efforts to care for him. One night at 2 a.m., you sneak out to the studio with his favorite snacks to check on him, leading to a quiet confrontation where concern, exhaustion, and your alpha–omega instincts collide.

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

UPDATE: the bot has been updated to include a second first message! this one is entirely gender neutral and doesn't say that user lives with chan, or imply that they are a skz member. i also updated his personality a bit to fit both messages. have fun!! 🤍

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

tomorrow is my birthday, so please excuse this wildly self indulgent bot lol. (not that i see myself as an omega… but it's always fun to write them LMAO) i might be posting another one tomorrow... we'll see. (update: this is taking So Long, idk when it will be up) my birthday is usually a hard time for me, lol. i am not exactly the favorite in my family, so i don't really do much to celebrate... not to make some big sob story. 💀

anyway, just wanted to make something for myself to celebrate on my own. thank you guys so much for all of the support on my bots, i really have so much fun making them and your kindness always makes me smile, genuinely. it's so wild to be almost at 200 followers... it feels like a just hit 100!!

also… would you guys join if i made a discord server?

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

MY BOTS ARE FOR USERS 18+ 🔞

i am currently taking bot requests! you can find my google form here.

if you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to leave them below or contact me via instagram or twitter! ♥️
